glue.datacatalogencryptionsettings.CfnAb: Sets the security configuration for a specified catalog. After the configuration has been set, the specified encryption is applied to every catalog write thereafter.

glue.datacatalogencryptionsettings.Catal.Description: The ID of the Data Catalog in which the settings are created.

glue.datacatalogencryptionsettings.DataC.Description: Contains configuration information for maintaining Data Catalog security.
